name: Astronomer
description: Astronomer — Managed Apache Airflow platform with observability, CI/CD for DAGs, and enterprise security features.

seo.title: Astronomer — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Astronomer: Astronomer — Managed Apache Airflow platform with observability, CI/CD for DAGs, and enterprise security features.

when_to_use: Managed Airflow with CI/CD DAG deployment pipelines
Multi-team Airflow with RBAC and environment isolation
Observability for DAG runs across 1000+ pipelines daily
Enterprise Airflow alternative to self-hosted clusters
Automated dbt and Spark orchestration in Astro workflows

pros: Managed Airflow saves weeks of Kubernetes ops
Astro CLI and Runtime improve local dev loop
DAG observability built in, unlike vanilla Airflow
Strong SOC 2 and enterprise security posture
cons: Still Airflow underneath, so its quirks persist
Vendor lock-in via proprietary Runtime image
Less innovation than Dagster or Prefect recently
review.verdict: Default pick for managed Airflow, though modern orchestrators now offer cleaner abstractions.
review.best_for: Enterprises already on Airflow who want managed infra and observability
review.not_for: Greenfield teams evaluating modern orchestrators like Dagster or Prefect
